name: tyf
description: A faithful apparatus for authorship. Skills install into $CODEX_HOME/skills or ~/.codex/skills for Codex. The author is the source; TYF never becomes the writer.

interface.longDescription: TYF bundles portable authorship skills and a helper discipline so agents preserve source, protect register, propose edits, and keep manuscript writes under explicit author control.
defaultPrompt: Start writing today with TYF, even without a title: set up the workspace, run `tyf start`, and open the candidate draft runway.
Bring in a scaffold, chat, folder, or zip with `tyf start <path>` so it is preserved before drafting.
